title: Infographic Controlled Cycle Closure and Reuse Handoff

placement_logic.location_strategy: Inserted after AG11B chart block so the data-style theme emphasis is followed by a conceptual service-flow explanation.
placement_logic.mobile_behavior: responsive SVG image width with auto height; static audit completed in AG11C

content_block_pattern.title: Digital touchpoint

title_label_pattern.title: How digital innovation supports public healthcare delivery
title_label_pattern.label_rule: Each content block uses a numeric step badge and concise public-service phrase.
title_label_pattern.no_statistical_claim_rule: Do not present conceptual flow as measured data or official workflow.

caption_credit_pattern.caption: Conceptual infographic showing a digital healthcare delivery flow; it does not represent a statistical dataset or official workflow.
caption_credit_pattern.visible_credit: Infographic: Drishvara. Source: article-derived conceptual synthesis.

future_reuse_conditions: Use only where a conceptual service flow improves reader understanding.
Do not imply official workflow unless source-backed.
Keep text-light blocks for mobile readability.
Retain caption, source note, visible credit and alt text.
Re-audit placement and mobile layout after insertion.
